rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TITO DANILO VARGAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Right, Title And Interest In Personal Property
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) It is unclear whether this is an appropriate petition under Probate Code §850, as Petitioner has neither alleged that this estate holds property belonging to Petitioner nor that property held by a third party belongs to this estate. Petitioner cites Probate Code §850(a)(2)(B), which refers to situations where the decedent, while living, binds himself to a contract to convey / transfer property. 2) Declaration of attorney filed on 11/21/19, which identifies the intestate heirs of the estate, has not been verified by Petitioner. It is also unclear who the intestate heirs are, as the declaration does not identify the alleged heirs' relationship to decedent or their lineage. 3) As noted previously, the proofs of personal service on annuity companies filed on 10/18/19 (4) do not have attached the Notice of Hearing that was served.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIA CHUN TAO PAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, disregarding Counsel's "updated status" filed on 12/23/19. A Court-apointed fiduciary must sign and verify all of her own pleadings. [CRC 7.103(c).] Status of closing estate is set for 4/29/20 (approximately six months from the date the petition was verified, as requested in the petition).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT PICASO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement (Modified Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment)
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Court to determine whether Stipulation should be approved and payments thereunder confirmed and allowed. Note: a.Administrator alleges that an agreement was made with "several Defendants". It is unclear whether all of the Defendants should have been parties to the stipulation. b. A Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation has already been entered in the unlawful detainer proceeding. 2) Order allowing preliminary distribution filed on 3/14/19 required a further report of status of administration or final distribution petition by 1/27/20, or an appearance would be required on 2/3/20. No petition has been filed as of the preparation of these hearing notes. NB: a status hearing date was not set by the Court.
